name: Cape Breton Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients and stir in the raisins.
2. Blend the remaining ingredients and stir until the dough is all together.
3. Toss the dough on a lightly floured surface until no longer sticky.
4. Knead a few times.
5. Divide the dough into two halves.
6. Pat each ball of dough into a 6-inch circle with the top slightly rounded.
7. Brush the tops with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
8. Cut each circle into 6 wedges.
9. Place the wedges 2 inches apart on a cookie sheet.
10. Bake at 425°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden.
11. Serve hot with butter and jam or flavored butter or honey.
